name: Cipher wants payback♡

I don't really have much to say in this rant text. I like Cipher and it seems a lot of other people do too, so I decided to make another bot of her. I'm still trying to make bots that haven't already been made, like my Yvonne futa bot, or my Black Swan chastity cage bot. I understand why there aren't many bots of these in the two fandoms, the reason being it's not at popular themes as for example: "You owe Topaz debt" or an ntr bot. There is a lot of ntr bots, which is pretty fucked up. Ntr is just cheating or being cheated on. Lmk if you wanna see other scenarios with Cipher, like a; "Cipher sissy training" or "Cipher is in heat". Idk, I'm just spitballing.

Anyway not much else to say. Mili is the goat of music and I won't tolerate any slander against the band.

As always, have fun!
